description.ko: 희귀한 생체 발광 생명체들이 영원한 어둠 속을 밝히는 고압의 고요한 해저 세계를 탐험하는 심해 여정입니다.
description.en: A deep-dive exploration into the silent, high-pressure world of the ocean floor, where rare bioluminescent lifeforms illuminate the eternal darkness of the abyss.

prompt: Hyper-realistic underwater photography of the deep ocean abyss, AQUA-5 concept, bioluminescent marine organisms glowing in neon cyan and violet, volcanic hydrothermal vents with rising bubbles, dark obsidian seafloor, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, marine snow drifting through the water.
